title: DC Distro 3A
description: DC Distro 3A is a 4 HP utility module that delivers up to 3A at 12V from the included 100–240V wall supply to Gen3 and other LZX modules with rear 2.1mm DC barrel power entry (including Liquid TV, Memory Palace, and Chromagnon in barrel mode). Three barrel distribution jumpers are in the box; more lengths are available separately. Depth ~2.5 in (9 barrel outputs). For EuroRack ribbon power, use a standard bus and flying lead—this module is the barrel-only distribution path. Full use cases are in the product Manual tab.
